childElements.name: DEL_BusinessLicense

childElements.name: DEL_PersonEducation

childElements.name: RA_LoadData

childElements.name: UserChanges
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "IsMedicalLicenseChanged" : "=%OriginalApplicantInfo:Qualification:BLK_Qualification:MUL_MedicalLicenseState% <> %QualificationDetails:BLK_Qualification:MUL_MedicalLicenseState%", "IsPersonEducationChanged" : "=%OriginalApplicantInfo:Applicant:BLK_Applicant:Program% <> %ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:Program% || %OriginalApplicantInfo:Applicant:BLK_Applicant:EndDate% <> %ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:EndDate%", "IsPersonEducationDeleted" : "=%ApplicantDetails:BLK_ApplicantProfessionalStatus% <> \"Resident\"", "IsBoardCertChanged" : "=%OriginalApplicantInfo:Applicant:BLK_Applicant:BoardCertified% <> %ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:BoardCertified%", "IsPractSpecialtyChanged" : "=%ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:TA_PracticingSpecialty-Block:TA_PracticingSpecialty% <> %OriginalApplicantInfo:Applicant:BLK_Applicant:TA_PracticingSpecialty-Block:Name%", "IsPrimarySpecialtyChanged" : "=%ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:TA_PrimarySpecialty-Block:TA_PrimarySpecialty% <> %OriginalApplicantInfo:Applicant:BLK_Applicant:TA_PrimarySpecialty-Block:Name%", "IsAdditionalSpecilityAdded" : "=ISNOTBLANK(%ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:TA_AdditionalSpecialties-Block:TA_AdditionalSpecialties%)", "IsClinicianChanged" : "=%OriginalApplicantInfo:Applicant:BLK_Applicant:ProfessionalTitle% <> %ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:ProfessionalTitle% || %OriginalApplicantInfo:Applicant:BLK_Applicant:ProfessionalStatus% <> %ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:ProfessionalStatus% || %OriginalApplicantInfo:Applicant:BLK_Applicant:SponsershipNeed% <> %ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:SponsershipNeed% || %OriginalApplicantInfo:Applicant:BLK_Applicant:VisaType% <> %ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:VisaType% || %OriginalApplicantInfo:Applicant:BLK_Applicant:VisaType% <> %ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:VisaType% || %OriginalApplicantInfo:Applicant:BLK_Applicant:NPType% <> %ApplicantDetails:BLK_Applicant:NPType%" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }
